items.html: Indeed, when these come out to become Mochin [minds] for his Nukva [female], they pierce the Masach [screen] and the Kelim [vessels] of ZA [Zeir Anpin] through his back, and come out and are placed in her head. Then their strength is greatly weakened, and there is no comparing their illumination now to their illumination before they passed through the Masach, for now their illumination is greatly weakened and diminished; therefore they are called females.
